dimensions.name: Metadata
dimensions.description: The artifact has valid identity, description, and discoverable ownership data.

dimensions.name: Activation
dimensions.description: The artifact explains when it should be used and what triggers it.

dimensions.name: Procedure
dimensions.description: The artifact gives actionable, ordered, or rule-based execution guidance.

dimensions.name: Verification
dimensions.description: The artifact names checks, tests, builds, reviews, or other verification steps.

dimensions.name: Safety
dimensions.description: The artifact addresses permission, destructive action, secret, privacy, or rollback risk.

dimensions.name: Supporting material
dimensions.description: The artifact has references, examples, scripts, tests, or other support assets.

dimensions.name: Portability
dimensions.description: The artifact avoids hard-coded local assumptions and works across target repositories.
